untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (double bottom formation and breakout detection) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. Double bottom patterns, yearly positioning comparisons, and throwback probability assessments require candlestick pattern analysis beyond the available technical indicator set. Stop placement and profit target computation are explicitly marked AUTHOR_SILENT.
translation_notes: The AADB pattern itself (double bottom formation, breakout confirmation, yearly positioning context) cannot be mechanically expressed with standard indicators. A proxy entry was created using price position in 20-day range as a breakout indicator, but this does not capture the true pattern logic. The 67% throwback occurrence rate cannot be modeled as a mechanical exit condition. Market regime context (bull vs bear) is noted in target_regime but cannot be operationalized without explicit regime detection. Recommend implementing custom pattern recognition function for double bottom detection.
